fidelity.reason: The timing, information, privacy constraint, objective, and threshold mechanism are preserved, but a noncontrolling observer replaces the moderation policy owner.

before classifying a new content item

evidence_spans: More review reduces classification harm but consumes scarce reviewer attention.
outside observer who cannot make the decision
